label: Verb properties
description: Defines one attack mode for a weapon or pawn, covering projectile, melee, beam, and spray verbs.

verbClass.label: Verb class
verbClass.description: Fully qualified C# class (Verb subclass) that implements the attack logic.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display name for this verb in the gizmo bar.

defaultVerb.label: Default verb
defaultVerb.description: If true, this is the default attack mode activated when the weapon is equipped.

minRange.label: Min range
minRange.description: Minimum attack range in cells. Targets closer than this cannot be attacked.

noiseRadius.label: Noise radius
noiseRadius.description: Radius in cells within which this attack alerts nearby hostiles.

projectileDef.label: Projectile def
projectileDef.description: ThingDef of the projectile fired. Private in source but used in shipped XML.

defaultProjectile.label: Default projectile
defaultProjectile.description: ThingDef used as the default projectile when no ammo-specific projectile is loaded.

warmupTime.label: Warmup time
warmupTime.description: Seconds the pawn must aim before firing.

muzzleFlashScale.label: Muzzle flash scale
muzzleFlashScale.description: Scale of the muzzle flash effect played on fire.

impactFleck.label: Impact fleck
impactFleck.description: FleckDef spawned at the impact point when this verb hits.

burstShotCount.label: Burst shot count
burstShotCount.description: Number of projectiles fired per trigger pull.

ticksBetweenBurstShots.label: Ticks between burst shots
ticksBetweenBurstShots.description: Game ticks between successive shots in a burst.

soundCast.label: Sound cast
soundCast.description: SoundDef played when this verb fires.

soundCastTail.label: Sound cast tail
soundCastTail.description: SoundDef played after the weapon fires (e.g. a tail crack).

soundAiming.label: Sound aiming
soundAiming.description: SoundDef looped during the warmup aiming phase.

soundHit.label: Sound hit
soundHit.description: SoundDef played when this verb hits a target.

soundMiss.label: Sound miss
soundMiss.description: SoundDef played when this verb misses.

targetParams.label: Target parameters
targetParams.description: Constraints on which targets this verb can select.

forcedMissRadius.label: Forced miss radius
forcedMissRadius.description: Radius within which shots are randomly scattered. Private in source but used in shipped XML (e.g. mortars).

forcedMissRadiusClassicMortars.label: Forced miss radius (classic mortars)
forcedMissRadiusClassicMortars.description: Override forced miss radius used when the classic mortars difficulty setting is on. Private in source.

isMortar.label: Is mortar
isMortar.description: If true, this verb uses mortar targeting rules including minimum range enforcement. Private in source.

onlyManualCast.label: Only manual cast
onlyManualCast.description: If true, AI pawns will not use this verb; only player-directed attacks are allowed.

ai_IsIncendiary.label: AI: is incendiary
ai_IsIncendiary.description: Hint to the AI that this verb sets things on fire.

ai_IsBuildingDestroyer.label: AI: is building destroyer
ai_IsBuildingDestroyer.description: Hint to the AI that this verb is effective at destroying structures.

requiresEquipment.label: Requires equipment
requiresEquipment.description: If true, the pawn must be holding an equipped item to use this verb.

requiresAnyWeapon.label: Requires any weapon
requiresAnyWeapon.description: If true, the pawn must be holding any weapon (not necessarily this one) to use this verb.

bodypartTagTarget.label: Body part tag target
bodypartTagTarget.description: BodyPartTagDef that this verb specifically targets on the enemy body.

accuracyStat.label: Accuracy stat
accuracyStat.description: StatDef on the shooter that scales hit probability.

manipulationPowerFactor.label: Manipulation power factor
manipulationPowerFactor.description: How much the pawn's Manipulation capacity affects this verb's power.

linkedBodyPartsGroup.label: Linked body parts group
linkedBodyPartsGroup.description: BodyPartGroupDef whose limb health gates whether this verb can be used.

ensureLinkedGroupUpFront.label: Ensure linked group up front
ensureLinkedGroupUpFront.description: If true, the linked body parts group is always preferred for this verb.

meleeDamageDef.label: Melee damage def
meleeDamageDef.description: DamageDef applied by this melee verb.

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight controlling how often this verb is selected in a melee exchange.

minIntelligence.label: Min intelligence
minIntelligence.description: Minimum pawn intelligence level required to use this verb.

commonalityVsEdificeFactor.label: Commonality vs edifice factor
commonalityVsEdificeFactor.description: Multiplier on this verb's selection weight when the target is a building or edifice.

reactionSpeed.label: Reaction speed
reactionSpeed.description: Factor applied to cooldown reductions when this verb counter-attacks.

drawAimPie.label: Draw aim pie
drawAimPie.description: Whether the arc aiming indicator is drawn while the pawn aims with this verb.

colonistOnly.label: Colonist only
colonistOnly.description: If true, only player-faction colonists can use this verb.

damageDef.label: Damage def
damageDef.description: DamageDef applied by this melee verb.

damageAmountBase.label: Damage amount base
damageAmountBase.description: Base damage amount for this melee verb. -1 derives from MeleeDamage stat.

armorPenetrationBase.label: Armor penetration base
armorPenetrationBase.description: Base armor penetration factor (0–1) for this melee verb. -1 derives from power.

stopBurstWithoutLos.label: Stop burst without LOS
stopBurstWithoutLos.description: If true, burst fire halts when line of sight to the target is lost mid-burst.

fieldOfFire.label: Field of fire
fieldOfFire.description: Cone half-angle in degrees restricting the directions this verb can fire. 0 means unlimited.

targetable.label: Targetable
targetable.description: Whether the player can manually target this verb at a specific location or thing.
